identity.name: AUREON
identity.mission: Premium construction solutions specializing in ETICS (Capoto) and Microcement.
identity.tone: Professional, Technical, Durable, Modern, Portuguese Craftsmanship

headings.usage: Main headlines, section titles. Use tight tracking (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: Paragraphs, UI elements, technical specs. High legibility.

primary.name: Obsidian Structure
primary.usage: Text, Strong Borders, Primary Buttons (High Contrast)

accent.name: Thermal Terracotta
accent.usage: Call to Actions (Secondary), Highlights, Icons, 'Warmth' indicators

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode A for Services, Mode B for Technical Specs)
layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-12 to p-24 for section padding.
layout.border_radius: rounded-none (Sharp/Technical) or rounded-sm (2px) for slight softening. Avoid large rounded corners.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#333333] rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-[#1A1A1A] text-[#1A1A1A] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-widest text-sm font-bold transition-all
buttons.accent: bg-[#C8553D] text-white hover:bg-[#A04430] rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all

cards.service_card: bg-white border border-[#E5E0D8] p-8 hover:border-[#C8553D] transition-colors duration-300 group

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-[#8C8C8C] focus:border-[#1A1A1A] outline-none rounded-none px-0 py-4 placeholder:text-[#8C8C8C]/50

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain overlays on solid backgrounds to mimic concrete/plaster texture.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimal. Use 'shadow-sm' or flat borders. Construction feels solid, not floating.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Thin/Light weight) or Lucide (Stroke 1.5). Technical look.

motion.reveal: Fade-in Up with slight delay for grid items.
motion.hover: Images scale slightly (1.05) inside overflow-hidden containers.

hero.alt: Modern white villa in Portugal with clean ETICS finish

instructions_to_main_agent.general: Build a single-page application (SPA) feel with distinct sections. Use 'react-scroll' for navigation.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero_section: Full height (h-screen). Overlay text: 'Excelência em Isolamento e Acabamentos'. CTA: 'Pedir Orçamento'.
instructions_to_main_agent.services_section: Use a Bento Grid. Highlight 'Capoto (ETICS)' and 'Microcimento' as the two main pillars.
instructions_to_main_agent.technical_section: Create a 'Technical Area' with accordions for 'Vantagens do Capoto', 'Processo de Aplicação', 'Normas Europeias'. Use the accent color for icons here.
instructions_to_main_agent.portfolio_section: Masonry grid layout. Use the provided images mixed with placeholders if needed. Implement a simple lightbox.
instructions_to_main_agent.contact_section: Two columns: Left = Contact Info + Map placeholder. Right = Form (Name, Email, Phone, Service Type, Message).
instructions_to_main_agent.whatsapp: Floating button bottom-right. Green (#25D366) with WhatsApp icon.
instructions_to_main_agent.footer: Dark background (#1A1A1A). White text. Links to privacy, terms, and social media.

do_not: Do not use rounded buttons (use sharp/pill).
Do not use 'Inter' font for headings.
Do not make the site look cluttered. White space is luxury.
